LanguageData.AD_AutoUndraft_Desc: Soldiers automatically undraft and return to work after all hostiles are down.
LanguageData.AD_FleeNonCombatants_Desc: Pacifists sprint to the safest roofed area in your home zone when threats appear.
LanguageData.AD_AssignHint: Mark individual pawns as soldiers using the "Soldier" button on selected colonists. Assign combat posts where they will hold position during threats.
LanguageData.AD_ToggleSoldier_Desc: Toggle this pawn as a soldier. Soldiers auto-draft and go to their combat post when threats appear.
LanguageData.AD_SetPost_Desc: Click a location on the map where this soldier will hold position during combat.
LanguageData.AD_SetPost_Current: Combat post at ({0}, {1}). Click to change.
LanguageData.AD_ThreatDetected: Auto Draft: {0} soldiers moving to combat posts!
LanguageData.AD_ThreatCleared: Auto Draft: Threats cleared. {0} soldiers standing down.
